name: Stripe Conformance Required
description: Formalizations of Stripe payment code must be verified against the Stripe Payment Reference Model.
rationale: Payment processing code must conform to the canonical Stripe API state machine. The agent's formalization must be proved to be a valid refinement of the reference model.

examples.passes: Formalize → DefineVG(conformance) → Verify(proved against Stripe ref model)
examples.fails: Formalize of Stripe code without conformance verification
